mapper.sql: r.id, r.order_id, r.reviewer_id, r.target_user_id, r.score, r.content, r.create_time, reviewer.username AS reviewer_name, target.username AS target_user_name, p.title AS product_title
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review(order_id, reviewer_id, target_user_id, score, content, create_time) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{reviewerId}, #{targetUserId}, #{score}, #{content}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM review r LEFT JOIN sys_user reviewer ON r.reviewer_id = reviewer.id LEFT JOIN sys_user target ON r.target_user_id = target.id LEFT JOIN order_info o ON r.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE r.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT FROM review r LEFT JOIN sys_user reviewer ON r.reviewer_id = reviewer.id LEFT JOIN sys_user target ON r.target_user_id = target.id LEFT JOIN order_info o ON r.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE r.target_user_id = #{targetUserId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT FROM review r LEFT JOIN sys_user reviewer ON r.reviewer_id = reviewer.id LEFT JOIN sys_user target ON r.target_user_id = target.id LEFT JOIN order_info o ON r.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE r.reviewer_id = #{reviewerId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT FROM review r LEFT JOIN sys_user reviewer ON r.reviewer_id = reviewer.id LEFT JOIN sys_user target ON r.target_user_id = target.id LEFT JOIN order_info o ON r.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
